refinement_sections.content: The company has a sorting algorithm that is not working well for sorting data. I need to figure out what is wrong with it and how to make it better.
I need to make sure the sorting still works correctly and can sort big amounts of data quickly. Also, I have to compare it with another sorting method.

1. Look at the current sorting algorithm and see how it works. 2. Find out what makes it slow or not good. 3. Try to make it faster or better. 4. Pick another sorting algorithm to compare with. 5. Write a report about what I did, what I found, and any guesses I made.
I assume that the current algorithm is not optimized for large datasets. I also think that the comparison algorithm should be one that is commonly used and well-known.
I need to finish all of this in two weeks, so I should plan my time carefully to get it done.
